pages.text: The $(item)Ancient Skyseed$() — deepslate and cobbled deepslate. Dig the core of a $(bold)Rocky island thrown deep$(), down near the world's floor.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.
A shard of the deep, hung in the sky. Mossy deepslate and tuff, with dripstone teeth on its underside. Craft it from deepslate dug out of a low-thrown Rocky island.

$(bold)Riches$()$(br)Every deepslate ore lives here — $(item)iron$(), $(item)copper$(), coal and redstone in generous veins, down to diamond and emerald — plus $(item)amethyst$() geodes and $(item)dripstone$(). Like Rocky, height matters: grow it deep, toward the world's floor, and the diamond and emerald come thicker.
$(bold)Looks$()$(br)Deep cave (mossy, dripstone), geode (calcite), and a rare deep-dark variant with $(item)sculk$() — sensors, a catalyst, even a shrieker. And the moss to unlock the Lush island.
